header.globalBanApproveDescription: Approve the global ban request for {{userName}}?
header.globalBanRejectDescription: Reject the global ban request for {{userName}}?
header.globalBanApproveImpact: Approving will remove this account from all unfinished projects and block future system access.
header.globalBanRejectImpact: Rejecting will keep the account active and notify the administrator about your decision.
header.globalBanActionFailed: Unable to process the global ban request.
header.globalBanInvalidRequest: This notification no longer contains a valid global ban request.
header.globalBanResolvedApproved: This global ban request was approved.
header.globalBanResolvedRejected: This global ban request was rejected.
header.globalBanDecisionRequiredNote: If you approve, this user will be removed from every unfinished project and blocked from the system. If you reject, the account stays active.
header.globalBanNoProjects: No unfinished projects were attached to this request.
header.globalBanApproveNotePlaceholder: Optional note for audit trail or reassignment guidance.
header.globalBanRejectNotePlaceholder: Explain why this user should remain active and what must happen next.
header.globalBanApproveNoteHint: A short note helps admins and other managers understand the ban impact.
header.globalBanRejectNoteHint: A rejection note is required so the admin knows what to fix before requesting again.
header.globalBanRejectNoteRequired: Please enter a decision note before rejecting this global ban request.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password

forgotPassword.success: Your password reset request has been recorded
forgotPassword.error: Failed to send password reset request. Please try again.
forgotPassword.emailSentDesc: An administrator will review your password reset request. If SMTP delivery is unavailable, you may need to contact an administrator directly.
forgotPassword.localMailNote: This Development environment is writing email files locally instead of sending them to a real inbox.

reviewer.title: Review Dashboard
reviewer.subtitle: Manage and verify data quality from annotators
reviewer.noReviewData: No review data available for this project.
reviewer.projectAccessRevoked: Your access to this review project was revoked. Refreshing the project list now.
reviewer.accessForbiddenTitle: Review access is no longer available
reviewer.accessForbiddenMessage: Your current session no longer has reviewer access, or your review permissions were revoked.
reviewer.accessForbiddenHint: This page will stop auto-refreshing to avoid repeated errors. Please sign in again or contact your manager/admin if you still need review access.
reviewer.accessForbiddenEmptyState: Review projects cannot be loaded because your access was revoked.
reviewer.noTasks: No projects found matching your search.

dispute.title: Dispute Management
dispute.noDisputes: No disputes found for this project.
dispute.noProjectHint: Select a project to view disputes
dispute.commentPlaceholder: Enter your decision reason (REFER to Guideline above). All decisions must be based on official Guidelines...
dispute.commentRequired: Comment based on Guideline is required.
dispute.commentWarning: Please enter a comment based on Guideline. Cannot be empty.
dispute.escalationDesc: This dispute has been pending for {{days}} days. It may be escalated to Admin if not resolved soon.
dispute.annotationEvidenceHint: Review the exact image, shapes, and label usage before making the final decision.
dispute.noImageEvidence: This case does not have image evidence available.
dispute.noAnnotations: No stored annotations were found for this case.
dispute.escalationContextHint: This case was escalated as {{type}} and now requires manager judgment with full evidence.
dispute.noReasonProvided: No reason was provided by the annotator.
dispute.noLabelsUsed: No labels were detected in the stored annotation payload.
dispute.voteConflictHint: Votes are tied, so the manager decision is the deciding verdict.
dispute.voteMajorityApprove: The current reviewer majority leans toward approve.
dispute.voteMajorityReject: The current reviewer majority leans toward reject.
dispute.voteNoMajority: There is no clear reviewer majority yet.
dispute.noChecklistSelected: No checklist items were ticked for this label.
dispute.noChecklistEvidence: No checklist evidence was saved with this annotation.
dispute.noReviewerEvidence: No reviewer feedback is available for this case.
dispute.noGuidelineReference: There is no guideline metadata available for this project.
dispute.decisionDeskHint: Use the evidence above to decide whether the annotator or the review side is correct.
dispute.escalationDecisionHint: Use the evidence above to finalize this penalty or escalation case.
dispute.acceptDisputeShort: Keep the annotator output as correct and overturn the rejection.
dispute.rejectDisputeShort: Uphold the rejection and send the work back for another annotation cycle.
dispute.approveEscalationShort: Finalize the current annotation as approved.
dispute.rejectEscalationShort: Keep the item rejected and return it to the correction cycle.
dispute.acceptDisputeHelp: Choose this when the image, labels, and reviewer notes show the annotator was correct. Rejected reviewers will need to align with the final ruling.
dispute.rejectDisputeHelp: Choose this when the annotator output is still wrong after reviewing the evidence. The item should go back for correction and another full review cycle.
dispute.approveEscalationHelp: Choose this when the evidence supports the current annotation and the manager wants to finalize it as approved.
dispute.rejectEscalationHelp: Choose this when the evidence still supports rejection and the item must return for correction.

reviewAudit.title: Review Audit — Sampling
reviewAudit.samplingDesc: Managers do not review all submissions. Instead, they sample randomly to evaluate Reviewer quality. Audit results are used to calculate Override Rate and RQS (Reviewer Quality Score).
reviewAudit.overrideLow: Low Override Rate — Reviewer performing well
reviewAudit.noTasks: No reviewed tasks found for this project.
reviewAudit.noProjectHint: Select a project to view reviews for auditing
reviewAudit.agreeQuestion: Do you agree with the Reviewer's decision?
reviewAudit.auditPlaceholder: Enter audit comment (REFER to Guideline above). All decisions must be based on official Guidelines...
reviewAudit.auditCommentRequired: Comment based on Guideline is required.
reviewAudit.auditCommentWarning: Please enter audit comment based on Guideline. Cannot be empty.

landingHero.desc: Connect your team of labeling experts, reviewers, and project managers on a centralized workspace.

landingFeatures.title: Solutions for Every Role
landingFeatures.desc: Smart permission system optimizes workflow from data collection to completion.
landingFeatures.managerDesc: Manage projects, monitor KPIs and overall labeling progress. Manage resources and get real-time performance reports.
landingFeatures.reviewerDesc: Control data quality with powerful Approve/Reject tools. Ensure the highest accuracy for digital data.
landingFeatures.annotatorDesc: Focused workspace, maximizing productivity for labelers with smart support tools.

landingCTA.title: Ready to get started?
landingCTA.desc: Experience the most professional labeling management platform today.

workspace.noImages: This project has no images yet.
workspace.criteriaHint: Criteria (all must be checked to use this label):
workspace.guidelineConfirm: I have read the guidelines — Start labeling
workspace.rejectedHint: Please read the comment on the right and make corrections.
workspace.hoverCanvas: Hover over the image to see coordinates
workspace.skipVisibleHint: If you see any valid objects in the image, please label them before submitting. Skipping visible objects may affect your quality score.
workspace.relabelRestrictedTitle: This task was reopened after a label update
workspace.relabelRestrictedHint: Annotations for the edited label were removed. Other annotations stay visible as reference only. You can redraw only these updated labels: {{labels}}.
workspace.relabelLockedFlags: Previous default-label selections are locked for reference
workspace.referenceAnnotations: Reference annotations from the previous approved version
workspace.editableAnnotations: Editable annotations for the updated label
workspace.noLabelWarning: You have not assigned any labels to this image. Please assign at least 1 label before submitting.
workspace.missingLabels: Missing labels! Required labels not used: {{names}}. You must label ALL required objects in the image.
workspace.draftFailBeforeSubmit: Failed to save draft. Please try again before submitting.
workspace.batchConfirm:
You are about to submit {{count}} images at once.

Images without label data will be rejected by the system.
Are you sure you want to submit?
workspace.batchFailed: Submission failed. Please check your data.
workspace.batchError: Error during batch submission. Please try again.
workspace.disputeSuccess: Dispute submitted successfully! Manager will review.
workspace.disputeHint: Enter the reason if you believe the Reviewer's decision was incorrect.
workspace.disputeAcceptedTitle: Dispute accepted - Manager ruled in your favor
workspace.disputeRejectedTitle: Dispute rejected - Manager upheld the rejection
workspace.rejectorsNotified: The relevant reviewers have been notified to re-review this task.
workspace.reviewGuidelinesAndResubmit: Please review the guidelines carefully and resubmit your work.
workspace.reviewersWillRereview: All reviewers will review again when you resubmit.
workspace.aiPanelHint: Use 1-3 current annotations as exemplars, send them to GECO2, and review the returned preview image plus object count.
workspace.aiStatusUnavailable: Unable to check AI status right now.
workspace.aiDetectingHelp: The AI is analyzing the current image. The preview will appear below as soon as processing finishes.
workspace.aiNeedExemplars: At least one valid annotation is required to run AI Preview.
workspace.aiNeedExemplarsHelp: Create at least one valid annotation first. The frontend will use up to {{max}} current annotations as exemplars for GECO2.
workspace.aiStatusReadyHelp: The service is ready. Click "Run AI Preview" to start inference for the current image. If the first pass returns nothing, the app will automatically retry lower thresholds and insert boxes when it finds them.
workspace.aiPreviewLoadedHelp: The AI preview is ready below. If the app could extract boxes from the result image, they have already been inserted into the canvas for review.
workspace.aiPreviewNoObjectsHelp: The AI did not find matching objects from the current exemplars yet. Try clearer exemplars, a different label, or a lower threshold.
workspace.aiPreviewAppliedHelp: The AI inserted {{count}} boxes into the canvas. Review them carefully, remove wrong boxes, and adjust manually if needed.
workspace.aiNoPreviewImage: The AI returned a result without a preview image.
workspace.aiBoxesInserted: Inserted {{count}} AI boxes into the canvas.
workspace.aiBoxesInsertedFromPreview: GECO2 reported count = 0, but the preview image still showed {{inserted}} boxes. The app inserted them into the canvas, so review carefully before submitting.
workspace.aiBoxesInsertedPartial: The AI reported {{detected}} objects, but only {{inserted}} boxes could be extracted from the preview image. Review carefully before submitting.
workspace.aiBoxesNotExtracted: The AI generated a preview, but the app could not auto-extract boxes from the result image.
workspace.aiPreviewNoRawCoordinates: The public GECO2 demo only returned a preview image for these {{count}} highlighted regions and did not expose raw coordinates. To avoid inserting wrong boxes, the app kept this as preview-only and did not draw them on the canvas.
workspace.aiPreviewCoordinateUnavailableHelp: The AI preview contains {{count}} highlighted regions, but the public GECO2 demo did not return raw coordinates, so the app did not auto-insert boxes to avoid positional drift.
workspace.aiRawCoordinatesUsed: Used {{count}} raw detection boxes returned directly from HuggingFace GECO2.
workspace.aiPreviewCoordinatesDerived: These AI boxes were inferred from the {{previewWidth}} × {{previewHeight}} preview image. Review carefully because they are not raw GECO2 bounding boxes.
workspace.aiPreviewCoordinatesRescaled: These AI boxes were inferred from the {{previewWidth}} × {{previewHeight}} preview image and scaled back to the original {{originalWidth}} × {{originalHeight}} image. Review carefully because they are not raw GECO2 bounding boxes.
workspace.aiDiagnosticsProviderComplete: HuggingFace completed this request via {{endpoint}} and returned {{count}} output items.
workspace.aiDiagnosticsPreviewOnly: HuggingFace responded successfully and returned a preview image, but it did not expose usable raw detection boxes for this result.
workspace.aiDiagnosticsRawReturned: HuggingFace responded successfully and returned raw GECO2 detection boxes for this result.
workspace.aiDiagnosticsNoUsableOutput: HuggingFace completed the request but did not return a preview image or usable raw detections.
workspace.aiThresholdAutoAdjusted: No results appeared at threshold {{from}}. The app automatically retried and used threshold {{to}}.
workspace.aiThresholdRetryExhausted: The app automatically lowered the threshold from {{from}} to {{to}}, but still did not find any objects. Try different exemplars.
workspace.aiInsertedBoxesCleared: Removed {{count}} AI boxes from the canvas.
workspace.aiPreviewDisclaimer: This preview is only for quick assistance. The public GECO2 demo does not expose raw bounding boxes, so AI boxes are inferred from the preview and still require manual review before submission.

datasets.awaitingManagerConfirmationHint: All images have been approved. The project stays in a waiting state until the manager confirms formal completion.

datasets.completionReviewLoadFailed: Unable to load completion review data for this project.
datasets.completionReviewReadyTitle: The project has reached 100% approval but still needs the manager's final sign-off
datasets.completionReviewReadyHint: Inspect the final annotations, all reviewer feedback, and previous return counts before officially marking the project as completed.
datasets.completionReviewClosedProjectTitle: This project is already closed, but the manager can still inspect it
datasets.completionReviewClosedProjectHint: If you find a problem after closure, you can send an image back for rework. The project will automatically reopen so annotators and reviewers can handle another round.
datasets.completionReviewSearchPlaceholder: Search by image, annotator, or note...
datasets.completionReviewNoItems: No images are currently ready for the completion review step.
datasets.completionReviewReturnHint: Returned images go back to the annotator, and reviewers will review them again after the next submission. If the project was already closed, it will reopen automatically.
datasets.completionReviewReturnPlaceholder: Explain why this image must be relabeled or reviewed again...
datasets.completionReviewReturnSuccess: The image was sent back for rework and the project reopened if needed.
datasets.completionReviewReturnFailed: Unable to send this image back for rework right now.
datasets.completionReviewSelectImage: Select an image from the left to inspect the completion details.
datasets.selectProjectHint: Select a project from the left panel to view data
datasets.exportModalHint: Review export readiness and choose the best handoff format before downloading.
datasets.exportFormatHint: Choose the format that best fits your downstream integration or delivery workflow.
datasets.noDataReason: This project does not have any image data to export yet.
datasets.noDataHint: No data has been uploaded to this project
datasets.exportReadySupport: There are no open disputes blocking export right now.
datasets.confirmDeleteLabel: Are you sure you want to delete this label?

analytics.paDescription: PA = Ratio of first-pass approved / Total data items.
analytics.clickAnnotatorHint: Click on annotator name to see per-project details
analytics.noAnnotatorAssigned: No annotators have been assigned yet.
analytics.reviewerAccuracyExplain: : % of correct reviewer decisions based on ground truth (Manager's decisions).
analytics.hasLabelsNoAnnotation: Labels exist but no annotations yet. Assign labels to images in the project.
analytics.noLabelData: No label data available. Create labels and assign them to images in the project.
analytics.clickProjectHint: Click on project name to view annotator / reviewer progress.
analytics.alertHighRejectProject: Project "{{name}}" has Rejection Rate {{rate}}% (> 30%) — Process review needed.
analytics.alertHighRejectAvg: Average Rejection Rate {{rate}}% exceeds 30% threshold — Process adjustment needed.
analytics.alertDeadlineRisk: Project "{{name}}" has {{days}} days left but only {{progress}}% progress — Deadline risk.
analytics.alertCriticalErrors: Annotator "{{name}}" has {{count}} critical errors — Retraining needed.
analytics.qualityMetricsDesc: PA = First-pass approved ratio / Total data items. Final Accuracy, First-pass and Rework Rate are the 3 key quality metrics.
analytics.priorityQueueHint: Projects with penalty reviews, disputes, or heavy reject load are pushed here first.
analytics.priorityQueueEmpty: No urgent arbitration items right now.
analytics.dashboardSubtitle: Track project health, staff quality, and urgent arbitration from one place.
analytics.globalBanPriorityTitle: Global ban approvals need manager action
analytics.globalBanPrioritySubtitle: These requests affect users still assigned to your unfinished projects, so they should be reviewed before normal project work.
analytics.globalBanPriorityNote: Approving here confirms the user should be removed from your unfinished projects and then blocked globally. Reject if the user must remain active while project-specific work is resolved first.
analytics.loadError: Unable to load manager analytics right now.
analytics.loadErrorTitle: Manager dashboard could not finish loading.

userMgmt.lockNoProjectNote: This user is not in any project. Safe to lock.

userMgmt.noAffectedProjects: No unfinished projects are currently listed for this account.
userMgmt.managerDecisionFlow: The manager will review these projects, decide whether the block should proceed, and approving will remove the user from every unfinished project before blocking access.
userMgmt.importHint: Max 5MB, .xlsx or .xls only. Only Annotators and Reviewers can be imported. Every new account uses the default password Password@123 and receives it by email. The import row limit is configured on the server.
userMgmt.resetPasswordDefaultNote: The system will generate a new random temporary password and email it to the user. The old password will only be replaced after email delivery succeeds.
userMgmt.passwordResetSuccess2: A new temporary password has been generated successfully
